// <auto-generated/>
import { Decimal, ValueObject } from '../../runtime';
import { ProductId } from './ProductId';

export class OrderLine extends ValueObject {
  readonly product: ProductId;
  readonly quantity: number;
  readonly unitPrice: Decimal;

  constructor(product: ProductId, quantity: number, unitPrice: Decimal) {
    super();
    this.product = product;
    this.quantity = quantity;
    this.unitPrice = unitPrice;
  }

  get subtotal(): Decimal {
    return this.unitPrice.multiply(this.quantity);
  }

  protected equalityComponents(): readonly unknown[] {
    return [this.product, this.quantity, this.unitPrice];
  }
}
